use std::path::Path;
use walkdir::WalkDir;

fn scan_roots(roots: &[&Path]) -> Vec<String> {
    let mut results = Vec::new();
    for root in roots {
        let entries: Vec<_> = WalkDir::new(root)
            .max_depth(5)
            .into_iter()
            .filter_map(|e| e.ok())
            .filter(|e| e.file_type().is_file())
            .collect();
        for entry in entries {
            results.push(entry.path().to_string_lossy().to_string());
        }
    }
    results
}
